Brand.name: The Silla Table
Brand.tagline: Pull up a chair. Hear the story of Silla.
Brand.valueProp: Not a travel agency — a table set by someone who has guided Silla for 20 years. Its stories, its flavors, its experiences.

Home.metaTitle: The Silla Table — Gyeongju & Silla stories, flavors and experiences
Home.metaDescription: Deep, English-first cultural stories, hands-on experiences and honest travel guidance for Gyeongju — the thousand-year capital of Silla — from a host of 20 years.
Home.storiesSubtitle: The meaning behind the monuments — history, food and season, told the way a host tells it.
Home.experiencesSubtitle: Small-group experiences and catering, hosted personally.
Home.guideSubtitle: Practical, honest guidance for getting the most out of Gyeongju.
Home.trustTitle: Twenty years at the same table
Home.trustBody: For two decades we have welcomed international guests to Gyeongju — designing experiences, hosting groups, and catering events large and small. The Silla Table is where that hospitality lives online.
Home.finalCtaTitle: Have a question, a date, or a group in mind?
Home.finalCtaBody: Tell us what you are hoping for. We reply personally, usually within one business day.

About.metaDescription: The story behind The Silla Table: twenty years of hosting international guests in Gyeongju, and the philosophy of gathering stories, flavors and experiences at one table.
About.title: A table set over twenty years
About.lead: The Silla Table is not a booking platform. It is one host's twenty years of welcoming visitors to Gyeongju, brought online.
About.nameMeaningBody: A table is where food is shared, where people sit together, and where stories are told. Those three things — flavor, gathering and story — are exactly what we have offered guests for two decades. One word holds all of it.
About.philosophyBody: Big platforms show you a product. We give you context: why this pond was built, what this dish meant to a Silla court, why a season changes everything. Understanding is what turns a visit into a memory.
About.trustBody: Two decades of on-the-ground operation, from intimate cultural walks to large international-event catering. We host in English, we host in person, and we host as if you were coming to our own table.

Contact.metaDescription: Ask about a cultural experience, a Silla-inspired meal, or catering for your group in Gyeongju. We reply personally, usually within one business day.
Contact.title: Start a conversation
Contact.lead: Tell us what you are hoping for — a date, a group size, an experience or a catered event. We reply personally, usually within one business day.
